name: case09_api_exchange_rate_job
description: Case 09: API exchange rate - S3 JSON source flattened to tabular format to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1": {"S3JsonSource": {"AdditionalOptions": {"EnableSamplePath": false, "SamplePath": ""}, "Exclusions": [], "JsonPath": "", "Multiline": true, "Name": "S3 JSON Source - case09_api_exchange_rate", "OptimizePerformance": false, "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": []}], "Paths": ["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case09_api_exchange_rate/"], "Recurse": true}}, "node-2": {"SparkSQL": {"Inputs": ["node-1"], "Name": "SQL Query", "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": []}], "SqlAliases": [{"Alias": "myDataSource", "From": "node-1"}], "SqlQuery": "SELECT CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(result.timestamp, 'T', ' '), '+07:00', '') AS TIMESTAMP) AS DATA_TIMESTAMP, result.api AS API_NAME, TO_DATE(result.date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS DATA_DATE, UPPER(col.currency) AS CURRENCY, col.country AS COUNTRY, CAST(col.buying_sight AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS BUYING_SIGHT, CAST(col.buying_transfer AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS BUYING_TRANSFER, CAST(col.selling AS DECIMAL(10,5)) AS SELLING FROM myDataSource LATERAL VIEW EXPLODE(result.data) t AS col"}}, "node-3": {"S3DirectTarget": {"AutoDataQuality": {"IsEnabled": false}, "Compression": "gzip", "Format": "csv", "Inputs": ["node-2"], "Name": "S3 Gzip CSV Target - case09_api_exchange_rate", "NumberTargetPartitions": "0", "PartitionKeys": [], "Path": "s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case09_api_exchange_rate/load/", "SchemaChangePolicy": {"EnableUpdateCatalog": false}}}}
